'''Groshim''' was a [[Kashirim]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was one of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Sha-Mar Ma-dred]]'s most trusted guards. He accompanied the King and his four wives to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], shortly before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], to protect the royal family while it petitioned for admittance to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
